panels.title: Total Views (Sessions)
panels.description: จำนวน session ที่กด play อย่างน้อย 1 ครั้ง

targets.rawSql: SELECT uniqExact(session_id) FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'play'

panels.title: Unique Users
panels.description: จำนวน user ที่ไม่ซ้ำที่กด play

targets.rawSql: SELECT uniqExact(user_id) FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'play'

panels.title: Total Watch Time (Hours)
panels.description: รวม watch_duration_seconds จาก watch_chunk เท่านั้น (ไม่ใช่ wall-clock)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(watch_duration_seconds) / 3600, 2) FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'watch_chunk'

panels.title: ✅ Completion Rate
panels.description: % session ที่ดูจนได้รับ completed event (ต่อ session ที่มี play)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((countIf(event_type = 'completed') / NULLIF(countIf(event_type = 'play'), 0)) * 100, 1) FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)

panels.title: ⏩ Seek Rate
panels.description: % session ที่มีการ seek อย่างน้อย 1 ครั้ง

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((uniqExactIf(session_id, event_type = 'seek') / NULLIF(uniqExactIf(session_id, event_type = 'play'), 0)) * 100, 1) FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)

panels.title: ⏱️ Avg Watch Time per Session (sec)
panels.description: เฉลี่ย watch_duration_seconds ต่อ session จาก watch_chunk

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(total_sec), 0) FROM (SELECT session_id, SUM(watch_duration_seconds) AS total_sec FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'watch_chunk' GROUP BY session_id)

panels.title: 📈 Views Over Time
panels.description: จำนวน play session ต่อชั่วโมง

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfHour(event_time) AS time, uniq(session_id) AS views FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'play' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: 📱 Device Distribution
panels.description: สัดส่วน session แยกตาม device_type

targets.rawSql: SELECT device_type, uniq(session_id) AS views FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'play' GROUP BY device_type ORDER BY views DESC

panels.title: 🔥 Top Performing Videos
panels.description: วิดีโอยอดนิยม — views, unique users, total/avg watch time จาก watch_chunk

targets.rawSql: SELECT video_id AS `Video ID`, uniqExact(session_id) AS `Total Views`, uniqExact(user_id) AS `Unique Users`, ROUND(SUM(session_sec) / 60.0, 1) AS `Watch Time (mins)`, ROUND(AVG(session_sec), 0) AS `Avg Watch Time (s)` FROM (SELECT video_id, session_id, user_id, SUM(watch_duration_seconds) AS session_sec FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'watch_chunk' GROUP BY video_id, session_id, user_id) GROUP BY video_id ORDER BY `Total Views` DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT country_code AS code, uniq(session_id) AS views FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'play' GROUP BY country_code

panels.title: 📉 Drop-off Distribution
panels.description: session ที่ไม่ completed จบที่ช่วงไหนบ้าง — bucket จาก SUM(watch_duration_seconds) ต่อ session

targets.rawSql: SELECT toString(intDiv(total_watched, 10) * 10) || 's' AS second_bucket, COUNT(*) AS drop_offs FROM (SELECT session_id, SUM(watch_duration_seconds) AS total_watched, maxIf(1, event_type = 'completed') AS is_completed FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY session_id) WHERE is_completed = 0 GROUP BY second_bucket ORDER BY toUInt32(replaceAll(second_bucket, 's', '')) ASC

panels.title: 📉 Retention Curve (MV)
panels.description: % คนที่ยังอยู่ในแต่ละช่วงเวลาของวิดีโอ — จาก video_retention_mv (pre-aggregated)

targets.rawSql: WITH total AS (SELECT uniqMerge(viewers) AS v FROM app_db.video_retention_mv WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime) AND bucket_seconds = 0) SELECT bucket_seconds AS second, ROUND(uniqMerge(viewers) / NULLIF((SELECT v FROM total), 0) * 100, 1) AS retention_pct FROM app_db.video_retention_mv WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime) GROUP BY bucket_seconds ORDER BY bucket_seconds ASC

panels.title: ⏩ Seek Behavior
panels.description: forward (seek_delta > 0) vs backward (seek_delta < 0) แยก bucket

targets.rawSql: SELECT multiIf(seek_delta_seconds > 0, 'Forward', seek_delta_seconds < 0, 'Backward', 'Same') AS direction, COUNT(*) AS seeks FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'seek' GROUP BY direction ORDER BY seeks DESC

panels.title: ⏰ Peak Hours (Play Events)
panels.description: ช่วงเวลาที่มีคนกด play มากที่สุด (local hour ของ event_time)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toString(toHour(event_time)) || ':00' AS hour, uniq(session_id) AS views FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'play' GROUP BY hour ORDER BY toUInt32(replaceAll(hour, ':00', '')) ASC

panels.title: 📊 Chunk Duration Distribution
panels.description: กระจาย watch_duration_seconds ต่อ chunk — ช่วยตรวจจับ drift หรือ chunk ผิดปกติ

targets.rawSql: SELECT toString(intDiv(watch_duration_seconds, 5) * 5) || 's' AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS chunks FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'watch_chunk' AND watch_duration_seconds BETWEEN 1 AND 120 GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY toUInt32(replaceAll(bucket, 's', '')) ASC

panels.title: 🏆 Video Performance Summary
panels.description: ภาพรวมต่อวิดีโอ — views, avg watch time, completion rate

targets.rawSql: WITH chunks AS (SELECT video_id, session_id, SUM(watch_duration_seconds) AS session_watch_sec FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'watch_chunk' GROUP BY video_id, session_id), events AS (SELECT video_id, session_id, maxIf(1, event_type = 'completed') AS is_completed, maxIf(1, event_type = 'play') AS is_play FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY video_id, session_id) SELECT e.video_id AS `Video`, COUNT(e.session_id) AS `Total Views`, ROUND(AVG(c.session_watch_sec), 0) AS `Avg Watch Time (s)`, ROUND((SUM(e.is_completed) / NULLIF(SUM(e.is_play), 0)) * 100, 1) AS `Completion Rate (%)` FROM events e LEFT JOIN chunks c ON e.video_id = c.video_id AND e.session_id = c.session_id GROUP BY e.video_id ORDER BY `Total Views` DESC
